docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT , FILED BY PETITIONER
DECLARATION OF INSPECTOR JOHN E. TURSI FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED: JUDGMENT IS FOR PETITIONER, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA. THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $13,802.00 US CURRENCY IS FORFEITED. ANY INTEREST OF CLAIMANT PERCY L BATES IN RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $13,802.00 US CURRENCY IS FORFEITED. THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $13,802.00 US CURRENCY, PLUS ALL INTEREST SHALL BE DISTRIBUTED PUR TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489-SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR FOR TRIAL BEFORE HONORABLE LUCY MCCABE. COURT TRIAL SEDT FOR DEC-10-2004 AT 8:30 A.M., DEPARTMENT #20. COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-10-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 20
